_comment: DeepSpeed ZeRO-3 for Chapter 1 Light tier on a100x4 (HF Jobs, $10/h). Optimizer state offloaded to CPU host RAM (568 GB available); param + grad shards stay on GPU. Pair with `optimizer: deepspeed_cpu_adam` in the YAML.
_comment_clip: gradient_clipping is HARDCODED here (not 'auto') because Accelerate's 'auto' resolves to the YAML's `max_grad_norm`, which we don't expose — our YAML uses `grad_clip_norm`. Hard-coding avoids silent disagreement. Mirror this value into the YAML's distillation.grad_clip_norm if you change it.
